{{Quote|Warning! Illegal cargo located on one of the freighters.|Outpost D-34, to Imperial [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]]|<ref name="Star Wars: TIE Fighter">[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]</ref>}}
'''''Onece 3''''' was one of five [[BFF-1 bulk freighter/Legends|BFF-1 bulk freighters]] in the [[Onece group|''Onece'']] flight group. Along with the other ships in the flight group, attempted to pass [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Outpost D-34]] in the [[Anoat sector/Legends|Anoat sector]]. It claimed it was carrying foodstuffs just as the other ships were. However it was inspected by [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]] who managed to identify its cargo of smuggling [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] fugitives fleeing [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] following the aftermath of the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]]. Maarek Stele then [[Skirmish at Outpost D-34|attacked]] the freighter reducing the ship's shields to minimum, allowing [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport|transport]] [[Sigma group|Sigma]] to disable and capture the freighter. Despite Rebel intervention in the form of [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttles]] the freighter was successfully captured and sent to an Imperial shipyard. The rest of the ships were allowed to pass and they entered hyperspace bound for parts unknown.

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']] {{1st}}
